title: Khānderi Island
tagline: Khānderi Island — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Khanderi (officially Kanhoji Angre island) is an island with a fort, located south of Mumbai, along the coast of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Khanderi (officially Kanhoji Angre island) is an island with a fort, located south of Mumbai, along the coast of Maharashtra, India.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kihim
topPlaces.description: Kihim is a small village located to the north of Alibag. Commonly known to people in Mumbai as a weekend getaway, it is accessible via Road and Water.

topPlaces.name: Varsoli
topPlaces.description: Varsoli is a village in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It encompasses an area of 240.03 ha (593 acres).

topPlaces.name: Chondhi, Alibag
topPlaces.description: Chondhi is a small village in the Alibag subdistrict of the Raigad district in Maharashtra, India. It is located to the north of Alibag on Alibag-Rewas Road.

topPlaces.name: Colaba Observatory
topPlaces.description: Colaba Observatory, also known as the Bombay Observatory, was an astronomical, timekeeping, geomagnetic and meteorological observatory located on the Island of Colaba, Mumbai (Bombay), India.

topPlaces.name: Tariq Garden collapse
topPlaces.description: On 25 August 2020, a building collapsed in Mahad, India, killing at least 12 people and trapping at least 60 others.

items.note: Kihim is a small village located to the north of Alibag. Commonly known to people in Mumbai as a weekend getaway, it is accessible via Road and Water.
Varsoli is a village in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It encompasses an area of 240.03 ha (593 acres).
Chondhi is a small village in the Alibag subdistrict of the Raigad district in Maharashtra, India. It is located to the north of Alibag on Alibag-Rewas Road.
Colaba Observatory, also known as the Bombay Observatory, was an astronomical, timekeeping, geomagnetic and meteorological observatory located on the Island of Colaba, Mumbai (Bombay), India.
On 25 August 2020, a building collapsed in Mahad, India, killing at least 12 people and trapping at least 60 others.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Khānderi Island?
faq.a: The best time to visit Khānderi Island is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Khānderi Island?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (43 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Khānderi Island?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Khānderi Island at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Khānderi Island?
faq.a: Stays in Khānderi Island start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Khānderi Island?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kihim, Varsoli, Chondhi, Alibag, Colaba Observatory, Tariq Garden collapse.
